SEARCH
Package io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi

Interface FieldContext

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultFieldContext
public interface FieldContext
Immutable view of a single @FieldMeta-annotated element (field or method) as seen during annotation processing.

Passed to FieldTransformer.supports(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext) and FieldTransformer.transform(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext). All access to annotation mirrors goes through this interface so that transformers never need a direct dependency on the javax.annotation.processing API.

Design note: annotation qualified names are passed as strings so that a transformer (e.g. in filterql-inputspec-starter) can reference annotations from a third library (e.g. FilterQL's @ExposedAs) without adding it as a compile-time dependency.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<String>
    annotationEnumList(AnnotationMirror mirror, String attribute)
    Reads an enum array attribute, returning the simple names of the constants.
    List<AnnotationMirror>
    annotationMirrorList(AnnotationMirror mirror, String attribute)
    Reads all nested annotation mirrors from an annotation array attribute.
    List<String>
    annotationStringList(AnnotationMirror mirror, String attribute)
    Reads a String[] attribute from an annotation mirror.
    Optional<String>
    annotationStringValue(AnnotationMirror mirror, String attribute)
    Reads a String attribute from an annotation mirror.
    String
    difspDataType()
    Returns the DIFSP dataType string for this field's scalar type: STRING, NUMBER, DATE, BOOLEAN, OBJECT.
    Element
    element()
    The underlying element: a VariableElement (field) or ExecutableElement (method).
    List<String>
    enumConstants()
    If isEnum() is true, returns the simple names of all enum constants in declaration order.
    Optional<AnnotationMirror>
    fieldMeta()
    The resolved @FieldMeta mirror for this element, if present.
    String
    fieldName()
    Logical field name, derived from the element: getName() → "name" isActive() → "active" status (field) → "status"
    TypeMirror
    fieldType()
    The declared type of the field or return type of the method.
    Optional<AnnotationMirror>
    findAnnotation(String qualifiedName)
    Finds the first annotation with the given fully-qualified class name.
    Optional<String>
    formatHint()
    Returns the format hint for this field type, if applicable.
    String
    formId()
    The form ID declared in @FormSpec.
    boolean
    hasAnnotation(String qualifiedName)
    Returns true if the element carries an annotation with this qualified name.
    boolean
    isEnum()
    Returns true if the field type is a Java enum.
    boolean
    isMultiValued()
    Returns true if the field type is a collection (List, Set, Collection) or an array — i.e.
    List<String>
    locales()
    The active locales declared for this form (from @FormSpec or defaults).

  • Method Details

    • element

      Element element()
      The underlying element: a VariableElement (field) or ExecutableElement (method).

    • fieldName

      String fieldName()
      Logical field name, derived from the element:
      • getName() → "name"
      • isActive() → "active"
      • status (field) → "status"

    • fieldType

      TypeMirror fieldType()
      The declared type of the field or return type of the method. For List<UserStatus> this is the full parameterized type.

    • fieldMeta

      Optional<AnnotationMirror> fieldMeta()
      The resolved @FieldMeta mirror for this element, if present. Absent when the element carries Jakarta constraints but no explicit @FieldMeta.

    • findAnnotation

      Optional<AnnotationMirror> findAnnotation(String qualifiedName)
      Finds the first annotation with the given fully-qualified class name.

      Use this to access annotations from other libraries without a compile dependency on them: 

      
 ctx.findAnnotation("io.github.cyfko.filterql.annotation.ExposedAs")

    • hasAnnotation

      boolean hasAnnotation(String qualifiedName)
      Returns true if the element carries an annotation with this qualified name.

    • annotationStringValue

      Optional<String> annotationStringValue(AnnotationMirror mirror, String attribute)
      Reads a String attribute from an annotation mirror. Handles both explicit values and annotation-defined defaults.
      Parameters:
      mirror - any annotation mirror accessible via findAnnotation(java.lang.String)
      attribute - the annotation method name (e.g. "value")

    • annotationStringList

      List<String> annotationStringList(AnnotationMirror mirror, String attribute)
      Reads a String[] attribute from an annotation mirror.

    • annotationEnumList

      List<String> annotationEnumList(AnnotationMirror mirror, String attribute)
      Reads an enum array attribute, returning the simple names of the constants.

      Example: @ExposedAs(operators = {Op.EQ, Op.GT}) → ["EQ", "GT"]

      Parameters:
      mirror - the annotation mirror
      attribute - the annotation method name (e.g. "operators")

    • annotationMirrorList

      List<AnnotationMirror> annotationMirrorList(AnnotationMirror mirror, String attribute)
      Reads all nested annotation mirrors from an annotation array attribute.

      Example: reads @ValuesSource.items → list of @Inline mirrors.

    • isEnum

      boolean isEnum()
      Returns true if the field type is a Java enum.

    • enumConstants

      List<String> enumConstants()
      If isEnum() is true, returns the simple names of all enum constants in declaration order. Otherwise returns an empty list.

    • isMultiValued

      boolean isMultiValued()
      Returns true if the field type is a collection (List, Set, Collection) or an array — i.e. expectMultipleValues should be true in DIFSP.

    • difspDataType

      String difspDataType()
      Returns the DIFSP dataType string for this field's scalar type: STRING, NUMBER, DATE, BOOLEAN, OBJECT.

      For collections, returns the type of the element (not the container). For enums, returns STRING.

    • formatHint

      Optional<String> formatHint()
      Returns the format hint for this field type, if applicable. For date/time types: "iso8601". Otherwise empty.

    • formId

      String formId()
      The form ID declared in @FormSpec.

    • locales

      List<String> locales()
      The active locales declared for this form (from @FormSpec or defaults). First element is the default locale.
